label: hobbies_and_activities
value: Enjoys playing strategy board games with friends during game nights. Discovered a new game at a library community event.

label: professional_details
value: Received a substantial bonus at work recently, which has given financial flexibility to significantly invest in classic car restoration projects.

label: plans_and_intentions
value: Interested in attending board game conventions and expos to discover new games and meet fellow enthusiasts. Notable conventions of interest include Gen Con, BGG.CON, Origins Game Fair, SPIEL der Jahres, PAX Unplugged, and Conway.

label: health_and_wellness_preferences
value: Engaged in safety training for new automated machinery at work. Interested in staying proactive about safety while adapting to new technology through thorough training, hands-on practice, continuous learning, fostering a safety culture, proper use of PPE, emergency preparedness, providing feedback, and leveraging technology. Interested in specific tools and software for monitoring safety and performance, including predictive maintenance software (e.g., IBM Maximo Asset Management, SAP Predictive Maintenance and Service), condition monitoring systems (e.g., Bosch Rexroth IndraControl, Siemens MindSphere), IoT platforms (e.g., Microsoft Azure IoT, AWS IoT SiteWise), data analytics and visualization tools (e.g., Tableau, Power BI), safety management software (e.g., EHS Insight, iAuditor by SafetyCulture), and real-time monitoring and alert systems (e.g., FactoryTalk Analytics by Rockwell Automation, GE Digital Predix).

label: activity_and_service_preferences
value: Interested in connecting with other classic car enthusiasts through online communities and forums such as ClassicCars.com Forums, Hemmings Motor News Forums, Hot Rod Forum, Classic Truck Hi-Performance, Reddit subreddits (r/classiccars, r/restoration, r/muscars, r/trucks), Facebook groups (Classic Car Enthusiasts Worldwide, Restoration Central, Vintage Muscle Cars), eBay Motors Community, Cruisin' Forums, Meetup.com, and social media platforms like Instagram and Pinterest using hashtags like #classiccar, #restoration, and #vintagecars.

label: financial_management_preferences
value: Received a bonus at work and considering investing it in high-end home brewing equipment and ingredients. Interested in recommendations for fermentation chambers, advanced wort chillers, precision hydrometers or refractometers, automated brewing systems, sanitization stations, high-quality fermenters, specialty grains and hops, yeast strains, water treatment systems, and adjuncts and additives. Also interested in consulting homebrew forums and communities, taking classes or workshops, and experimenting with recipes. Exploring new brewing technologies and trends such as smart fermentation systems, automated wort chillers, advanced water treatment systems, digital hydrometers and refractometers, CO2 monitoring and control, sour beers and wild yeasts, low ABV and sessionable beers, crafted non-alcoholic beers, sustainability and eco-friendly practices, innovative fermentation techniques, and the use of novel ingredients.
